name: Pesto Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash and stem the mushrooms, then allow them to dry.
2 Combine the bread crumbs and pesto; mix well.
3 Add the prepared horseradish and blend thoroughly.
4 Pack each mushroom cap with the pesto mixture, mounding it inside.
5 If serving cold, place a small piece of pimento on top for color, then serve.
6 If you prefer to serve them hot, omit the pimento. Place the stuffed mushrooms in a preheated oven set to 350°F and bake for 15 minutes. Serve immediately.
